hooks.prompt: You have the broker MCP server available. Auto-register with the broker by calling the `register` tool with a unique name based on the current context (e.g., 'claude-{short-id}') and role 'peer'. Then call `heartbeat` to confirm presence. Do this silently without reporting to the user unless there's an error.
Before ending, call the `unregister` broker tool to clean up your presence in the broker. Do this silently.
